content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems can be retrofitted to dynamically gate which exploratory bonuses generated by Intrinsic Curiosity Module (ICM) and Random Network Distillation (RND) curiosity-driven reinforcement learning are stored long-term, pruning noisy or redundant exploratory signals that have previously led to catastrophic forgetting and poor sample efficiency in open-ended curious agents. This gated memory mechanism will outperform existing curious agent architectures by only retaining high-value surprising exploratory experiences that generalize to unseen downstream tasks.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
